entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food in dryland regions

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of expanding the variety of crops or income sources in dryland regions

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid regions characterized by low rainfall

entities.name: CAPACITY STRENGTHENING
entities.description: The process of developing and strengthening the skills and resources of organizations and communities

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: The process of reducing the number of people living in poverty

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: Improving the means of securing the necessities of life

entities.name: MANDATE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that fall within the official scope of ICRISAT's research and development

entities.name: MISSION GOALS
entities.description: The overarching objectives that guide the actions of the Institute

entities.name: STRATEGIC PLAN
entities.description: A document used to communicate the organization's goals and actions up to 2020

entities.name: CROP BIODIVERSITY CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of preserving the genetic diversity of mandate crops
